items.name: glass-switch
items.title: Glass Switch
items.description: An accessible switch with a refracting glass handle that slides between off and on.

items.name: glass-slider
items.title: Glass Slider
items.description: A range slider with a refracting glass handle. Drag, or use arrow keys.

items.name: glass-segmented-control
items.title: Glass Segmented Control
items.description: A segmented control whose refracting glass lens slides between options. One filter, no map regen on selection change.

items.name: glass-tabs
items.title: Glass Tabs
items.description: Tabs with a refracting glass lens that slides between labels. WAI-ARIA tablist pattern, animated lens, no map regen.
